title: Feeorin (language)

'''Feeorin''' was the native language of the [[Feeorin/Legends|Feeorin]] species, although most Feeorin also learned [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]].<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

The word "Revanchism" was ''Jurmaarz'' in Feeorin.

Also, ''Ha'aruk ta'' was a formal greeting used among the ancient Feeorin people, used when first meeting offworld dignitaries.

{{Language-stub}}

*[[Knights of the Old Republic 29|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 29]]
